action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && grep "TASK4_EXCLUDE_REGEX\|TASK4_LLM_REGEX" config.cmake && echo "---" && cmake --build build -t task4-answer 2>&1 | tail -3 && wc -l build/test/task4/cases.txt 2>/dev/null && head -30 build/test/task4/cases.txt 2>/dev/null

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep \"TASK4_EXCLUDE_REGEX\\|TASK4_LLM_REGEX\" config.cmake && echo \"---\" && cmake --build build -t task4-answer 2>&1 | tail -3 && wc -l build/test/task4/cases.txt 2>/dev/null && head -30 build/test/task4/cases.txt 2>/dev/null", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Find task4 case set"}
